name: concrete/testimonial
title: Testimonial
description: Testimonial carousel with fully-interactive admin preview (BlockControls + InspectorControls).

quote1.default: CONCRETE delivered our web system with exceptional quality and efficiency. Their team is highly technical, communicative, and truly understood our requirements. The result exceeded our expectations and our system now handles thousands of daily transactions without any issues.

quote2.default: Working with CONCRETE has been a game-changer for our operations. Their BPO services are precise and reliable, and the development team consistently delivers on time and within budget. Highly recommended.
